channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Fixing AI failure: Three changes enterprises should make now
item.description: Recent reports about AI project failure rates have raised uncomfortable questions for organizations investing heavily in AI. Much of the discussion has focused on technical factors like model accuracy and data quality, but after watching dozens of AI initiatives launch, I’ve noticed that the biggest opportunities for improvement are often cultural, not technical.Internal projects that struggle tend to share common issues. For example, engineering teams build models that product managers don’t know how to use. Data scientists build prototypes that operations teams struggle to maintain. And AI a...

item.title: The Return of ‘Firefly’ Could Be an Animated Series
item.description: Nathan Fillion and the rest of the gang want to bring back 'Firefly' as an animated series, but without Joss Whedon at the helm.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Travis Kalanick’s return proves it really is 2016 again
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

item.title: I’ve been using Mac for decades - here are 5 new features in macOS Tahoe that I can’t live without
item.description: macOS Tahoe is here, and it's bringing a whole host of fantastic new features. Here are my favorites.

item.title: Wiz investor unpacks Google’s $32B acquisition
item.description: Shardul Shah of Index Ventures walks us through Google's biggest acquisition ever.

item.title: Your official Oscars streaming guide: how to watch, streaming deals, and more
item.description: The 2026 Oscars air on ABC and Hulu on March 15. No cable access? Here are the best streaming deals to watch live.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 Oscars online for free
item.description: How to watch Oscars for free. Live stream the 2026 Oscars for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: On a testé la MG4 Urban en Chine avant son arrivée en France : elle pourrait faire peur à la R5 avec ses batteries semi-solides inédites
item.description: En septembre 2025, SAIC a dévoilé en Chine une mise à jour significative de sa compacte MG4. Cette nouvelle mouture ne se contente pas d'un simple rafraîchissement esthétique : elle introduit une rupture technologique avec l'arrivée d'une version équipée de batteries semi-solides, une première pour une voiture électrique de grande série sur ce segment de prix. ...

item.title: Photo de la semaine : à une époque, on aurait parlé d’Ovni, découvrez la spirale éthérée qui a envoûté les Alpes
item.description: De l’imaginaire extraterrestre aux ballets orbitaux, il n’y a… qu’une spirale. À découvrir sur notre photo de la semaine.

item.title: BAFTA-winning game music composers don't see AI as a threat — rather, it could ‘revolutionize the art’
item.description: "I used to say that you can't teach AI to have a bad childhood, but now I'm thinking maybe there's an algorithm for that" – award-winning game music composers are surprisingly positive about AI and how it could influence composing.

item.title: 'God-tier audio in a car’ — I heard the new Cadillac’s AKG Dolby Atmos sound system and I’m never going back
item.description: Long and dark, shiny and black: why AKG’s new Lyriq EV Dolby Atmos sound system made me want to drive straight to the Cadillac ranch

item.title: I tried ChatGPT’s new visual explanations for math — and I was surprised how intuitive it feels
item.description: ChatGPT’s new visual math explanations show how interactive graphs and diagrams can make concepts like probability easy to understand.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Monday, March 16 (game #1512)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Monday, March 16 (game #1009)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Monday, March 16 (game #743)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: United’s President Predicted in 1976 the Airline Would Fly Supersonic Jets in 2026
item.description: Flights were supposed to be pretty expensive too.
